calendar.matters:
Petiton For Order Compelling Compliance With Investigational Subpoena
Off Calendar Apr-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jane Simon, Esq. (415.510.3521: janezack.simon@doj.ca.gov) Supervising Deputy Attorney General for Petitioner.
Brad Wishek, Esq. (916.444.9845: bwishek@rwslaw.com) of Rothchild Wishek & Sands LLP for Defendants. Dr. Jennifer Dore also present.
Blair Dore also present.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petiton For Order Compelling Compliance With Investigational Subpoena.

Petitioners' petition for order compelling compliance with investigational subpoena is granted for the reasons articulated in the judge pro tem's report and recommendation, which is adopted.

Parties to meet and confer on agreeable language on a proposed order to submit to the court.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/SRB)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Records Identifying Patient
Off Calendar Apr-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jane Simon, Esq. (415.510.3521: janezack.simon@doj.ca.gov) Supervising Deputy Attorney General for Petitioner.
Brad Wishek, Esq. (916.444.9845: bwishek@rwslaw.com) of Rothchild Wishek & Sands LLP for Defendants. Dr. Jennifer Dore also present.
Blair Dore also present.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT HELIOS PSYCHIATRY, JENNIFER DORE, M.D.'S Motion To Seal Records Identifying Patient.

Respondents' motion to seal records is granted for the reasons articulated in the judge pro tem's report and recommendation, which is adopted.

Parties to meet and confer on agreeable language on a proposed order to submit to the court.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/SRB)

Petiton For Order Compelling Compliance With Investigational Subpoena
Off Calendar Mar-29-2022 Continued To Apr-22-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jane Simon, Esq. (415.510.3521; Janezack.simon@doj.ca.gov) Supervising Deputy Attorney General for Petitioner.
Brad Wishek, Esq. (916.444.9845; bwishek@rwslaw.com) for Respondents.
Dr. Jennifer Dore, MD (represented by Mr. Wishek) also present as attendee.
Blair Dore, interested party, also present as attendee.

Respondents' Counsel does not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Petition For Order Compelling Compliance With Investigational Subpoena:
The matter is continued to April 22, 2022 at 9:30 am in Department 302, Law and Motion Department.
Judge Pro Tem to prepare report and recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
